div1.entryFree:
Coral, the solid secretions of zoophytes; supposed to be petrifactions and to be always red: c. is far more red, Sonn. 130, 2. of his bones are c. made, Tp. I, 2, 397.
Adjectively: c. mouth, Ven. 542. lips, Lucr. 420. ivory conduits c. cisterns filling, Lucr. 420 c. clasps and amber studs, Pilgr. 366 (not Shakespearian). lips, Shr. I, 1, 179.
